title: Terrain Rebalanced
description: Improves the terrain and caves of the Overworld while retaining the feel of Minecraft.
body:
[!["Minecraft Rebalanced" Collection by RainlessSky](https://img.shields.io/badge/Minecraft%20Rebalanced-2A2B2F?style=flat-square&logo=modrinth&label=part%20of&labelColor=222329)](https://modrinth.com/collection/rWTOiG2z)
![Minecraft Rebalanced sees survival as a survival game, and less of a free sandbox.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/jPZFRfGa/images/7ebd705feba2a30b4017405ac475012e475fdcd5.png)
This datapack changes the random terrain generation of the Overworld. It aims to improve apon some of the shortcomings of vanilla while feeling like Minecraft.

****

### This is a work in progress!
Terrain Rebalanced is extremely early in development. Feedback on vanilla world generation and on Terrain Rebalanced is greatly appreciated.

****

## Features
* Mountains are rarer but much prettier
* Large cave entrances on the surface have been shrunk
  * Large open caves underground still exist
* Elevation changes are more gradual
  * Common plateaus are usually smoother, making exploration a bit easier 

### Mountains
Individual mountains are rare, but make up for their rarity with satisfying peaks and pleasing gradients.

![A short Stony Peaks mountain with a calm slope up to the peak.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/CvniLALt/images/7295b993181c3d8eec61dc05360685d976a31fb1.png)


Large mountains are extremely rare, but I believe truly live up to what we all saw back when Caves and Cliffs was first shown off.

![An aggressive Stony Peaks mountain with a matching slope.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/CvniLALt/images/e6b75b218a62d8ce9391245ea6b93548e5a70c11.webp)

In vanilla, you'd see something like 2-8 Ancient Cities under each mountain range. That's a lot. In Terrain Rebalanced, because mountains tend to be few and far apart, Ancient Cities are also rarer. You can still find them under most individual mountains, and you'll find a couple of them under mountain ranges.

### Arid biomes
To me, Deserts didn't feel quite right; the pre-1.18-esque hills didn't feel right. With Terrain Rebalanced, deserts are often flat and any incline is gradual. Badlands, however, are identical if not better to vanilla.

![A flat Desert biome with a photogenic Badlands in the background](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/CvniLALt/images/313c4db02c368f7ec2a5d7ab59e83a962b1c4dcd.png)
